Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Ruckus: Racket for iOS 140 upvotes, 13 comments
  2. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 120 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. Aegis – open-source FPGA silicon 54 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 53 upvotes, 4 comments
  5. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 348 upvotes, 58 comments
  6. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 812 upvotes, 166 comments
  7. Show HN: OsintRadar – Curated directory for osint tools 24 upvotes, 1 comments
  8. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 163 upvotes, 31 comments
  9. Zml-smi: universal monitoring tool for GPUs, TPUs and NPUs 58 upvotes, 8 comments
  10. Rubysyn: Clarifying Ruby's Syntax and Semantics 58 upvotes, 8 comments
  11. Show HN: M. C. Escher spiral in WebGL inspired by 3Blue1Brown 103 upvotes, 18 comments
  12. Sad Story of My Google Workspace Account Suspension 42 upvotes, 7 comments
  13. AWS engineer reports PostgreSQL perf halved by Linux 7.0, fix may not be easy 334 upvotes, 97 comments
  14. Components of a Coding Agent 258 upvotes, 80 comments
  15. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 227 upvotes, 71 comments
  16. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 176 upvotes, 54 comments
  17. Demonstrating Real Time AV2 Decoding on Consumer Laptops 39 upvotes, 9 comments
  18. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 698 upvotes, 329 comments
  19. Show HN: I built a small app for FSI German Course 41 upvotes, 13 comments
  20. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 165 upvotes, 81 comments
  21. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 128 upvotes, 61 comments
  22. Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input, in Rust 80 upvotes, 35 comments
  23. The threat is comfortable drift toward not understanding what you're doing 175 upvotes, 100 comments
  24. Unverified: What Practitioners Post About OCR, Agents, and Tables 15 upvotes, 4 comments
  25. Costco sued for seeking refunds on tariffs customers paid 46 upvotes, 22 comments
  26. Talk like caveman 165 upvotes, 114 comments
  27. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 367 upvotes, 334 comments
  28. Ubuntu now requires more RAM than Windows 11 52 upvotes, 45 comments
  29. Shared mutable state in Rust (2022) 5 upvotes, 3 comments
  30. Hightouch (YC S19) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 9:00pm, 5 April 2026. Source here.
